findings.claim_text: The limited partnership structure creates a cap-table asymmetry unprecedented in venture history — external investors contribute $7.4B yet receive no voting rights, no board seats, and a 5-year lock-up.

DeepSeek's 10-50x inference cost advantage over US labs is a structural moat built on three compounding layers: China's subsidized industrial energy, DeepSeek's architectural innovations, and a domestic Huawei compute stack.
DeepSeek's $50B valuation, against an estimated ~$120M ARR, produces a revenue multiple of ~430x — a figure 12x to 22x higher than OpenAI and Anthropic.
